name: HRC_EVT_OBJ_CHANGE_COMPONENTS
description: An Source Object Change Component stores information about the date range over which a specific change takes place. In the case of a non-DE change there will be a single record with no Validation start/end dates. In the case of a DE change each individual change that is part of a series of changes brought about by the DE Operation will be captured.

columns.Name: CHANGE_COMPONENT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier

columns.Name: CHANGE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the Change Instance

columns.Name: PHYSICAL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indication that the component contains physical record changes

columns.Name: LOGICAL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indication that the component contains logical record changes

columns.Name: VALIDATION_START_DATE
columns.Comments: For DE entities the Validation Start Date of the affected change

columns.Name: VALIDATION_END_DATE
columns.Comments: For DE entities the Validation End Date of the affected change

columns.Name: OLD_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Effective Start Date old value

columns.Name: NEW_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Effective Start Date new value

columns.Name: OLD_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Effective End Date old value

columns.Name: NEW_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Effective End Date new value

columns.Name: OLD_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: The old sequence number of the changed record in the case of Multiple Changes per Day

columns.Name: NEW_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: The new sequence number of the changed record in the case of Multiple Changes per Day

columns.Name: CHANGE_ATTRS
columns.Comments: Changed Attributes stored in the form of name and values

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
